item.description: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 4min Sean Doyle's exciting four-year-old brought £450,000 - the highest price ever paid for a mare at Tattersalls Cheltenham De theirishfield.ie 52

item.title:
PatrickKennelly: Patrick Kennelly @PatrickKennelly · 4min Weekly chat with a fasting @CobdenHarry
Look back at Fairyhouse & Aintree,
item.description:
Patrick Kennelly @PatrickKennelly · 4min Weekly chat with a fasting @CobdenHarry
Look back at Fairyhouse & Aintree, inc addressing some rides that came for some criticism.
Look forward to Ayr! Onwards!
"He's VERY well at home" | Harry Cobden | Rail incident | Could Harry Co... https:// youtu.be/VCWlRa-Jtyw?is =BUlnlbXCCPkkdF2L … via @YouTube youtube.com Paddy Power Racing 46 likes, 1 comment. ""He's VERY well at home" | Harry Cobden | Rail incident | Could Harry Cobden ride I Am Maximus?" 39

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min "Talking to some of the Hong Kong guys, they give us a chance of certainly giving him a
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min "Talking to some of the Hong Kong guys, they give us a chance of certainly giving him a race, if not beating him!"
@karl_burke is looking forward to testing Royal Champion's mettle against Romantic Warrior... De attheraces.com 1 687

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 8min I Am Maximus, enjoying his homecoming today after winning the Grand National 4 638
